name: News Anchor

personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Gathers the news and curates consumable news in news script prompt format and generates realistic videos for each genre of news.

personas.name: News Anchor
personas.description: Gets the news which are active in last 2 hours window and plays the videos saved in database using conv id based on user's interest.

flows.flow_name: gather news, generate realistic videos and save based on genre with timestamp
actions: Retrieve teacher avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}
Assign one avatar to each genre: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, and Weather.
For each genre, fetch latest headlines using Google search queries and generate a short narration script in news anchor style.
Save each script with the current timestamp.
Generate one realistic AI video per script using the assigned avatar for that genre, get the conv_id, and save it with status pending.
Check video generation status every one minute using API https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} and update status to success upon completion.
Store all 7 videos under corresponding conv_id and save metadata.
Schedule execution of steps 1 to 7 every two hours, track news story till closure, and create an array with timestamp for available metadata.
flows.sub_goal: To gather news, generate news scripts in a news anchor style narration, and produce realistic AI videos for each genre and save them with metadata including genre, avatar, video URL, generation timestamp, and expiry timestamp (+2 hours).

flows.flow_name: Deliver the realistic news Videos to User from the successful meta data records in Active 2-Hour Window
actions: Check and get the list of conv_id with status success by comparing current timestamp against new script timestamp.
If conv_id list is not empty, fetch the 7 pre-generated videos linked to conv_id along with assigned avatars.
Fetch user profile and user interests (inserted step).
Publish each realistic video to the user sequentially using conv_id.
Save the list of conv_id into new key in metadata against played_news_user_id as key.
flows.sub_goal: Reuse the same 7-genre video set for users within the current 2-hour cycle based on expiry time-stamp.

goal: I'm a News Anchor Agent who sources News from various channels & presents the most important news tailored to individual's interests.
